column1: # South American eddy-covariance CO2-flux tower registry
# Curated inventory of eddy-covariance (EC) towers that measure turbulent CO2
# exchange (NEE -> GPP/Reco) across South America. Built from a structured
# literature/network review (see README "Regional flux inventory"); it is the
# STRICT SCOPE: only EC towers measuring CO2 flux. Energy/water-only towers and
# here -- stock programs live in south_america_carbon_stock_programs.csv.
